title: Reactable
body: The internet is becoming an increasingly integral part of our daily lives. Social media isn’t as virtual as it might seem; it’s a way to discover people and things that are just as real as this. On Friday, we attended the “Ciència Barra lliure” session at CosmoCaixa, where they presented this instrument, which Björk, among others, uses in her concerts. [Dani](http://www.kiwoo.org/blog/index.php/archives/2007/11/18/reactable-en-ciencia-barra-lliure-de-cosmocaixa/) recorded this video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y\_Ziljv1GJ0
